name: Fava Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tomato, onion, pepper, garlic, soy sauce, chili powder, and cumin in a blender.
2. Process on medium speed until smooth.
3. Add 1 cup of beans (either cooked pinto beans or fava beans) to the blender.
4. Blend on medium until well blended.
5. Add the remaining beans and blend again until smooth.
6. Serve with tortilla chips or crackers.
Yield: 2 cups
